items.description: What investors would really like is if fork in the markets merges into one. That tends to be the safer path to take.

items.title: Here's How Much $100 Invested In Caterpillar 10 Years Ago Would Be Worth Today
Dow pulls back from record, falls 400 points in broad market sell-off: Live updates
items.description: Stocks retreated Thursday, with technology stocks weighing on the major averages even as a broader rotation occurs beneath the surface.

items.title: The Gaza War Has Been Big Business for U.S. Companies
items.description: Two years on, Israel’s war in Gaza might be finally drawing to a close.  Sales of U.S. weapons to Israel have surged since October 2023, with Washington approving more than $32 billion in armaments, ammunition and other equipment to the Israeli military over that time, according to a Wall Street Journal analysis of State Department disclosures.

items.title: Enterprises Are Adopting Data and Governance Frameworks and Talent Strategies for Agentic AI, ISG Says
items.description: STAMFORD, Conn., November 12, 2025--Enterprise leaders will join the ISG AI Impact Summit, November 17–18 in New York, to discuss adopting, scaling and governing AI business solutions.
